LanguageData.FB_GenophageCocoon.label: genophage cocoon
LanguageData.FB_GenophageCocoon.description: A genetic cocoon that copies selected genes from a living donor and stores them in a genome archive.
LanguageData.FB_GenomeArchive.label: genome archive
LanguageData.FB_GenomeArchive.description: A living gene bank that stores extracted genepacks for inspection and later use by a gene reweaver.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaver.label: gene reweaver
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaver.description: A gene loom that prepares an internal flesh xenogerm from archived genes, then grows a cocoon to integrate it into a pawn.
LanguageData.FB_GenophageCocoonEmbryo.label: genophage cocoon embryo
LanguageData.FB_GenophageCocoonEmbryo.description: An immature genetic organ that will grow into a genophage cocoon.
LanguageData.FB_GenomeArchiveEmbryo.label: genome archive embryo
LanguageData.FB_GenomeArchiveEmbryo.description: An immature gene-storage organ that will grow into a genome archive.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverEmbryo.label: gene reweaver embryo
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverEmbryo.description: An immature gene organ that will grow into a gene reweaver.
LanguageData.FB_Chromophage.label: chromophage
LanguageData.FB_Chromophage.description: A fused fleshbeast that extracts gene traces from dead humanlike bodies and delivers them to a genome archive.
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCocoon.label: gene reweaver cocoon
LanguageData.FB_GeneReweaverCocoon.description: A temporary genetic cocoon grown by a gene reweaver. It holds a pawn while the prepared flesh xenogerm integrates into the body.
